fields.label: User
fields.description: Frappe User account linked to this portal user

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Portal user status

fields.label: Portal Role
fields.options:
Brand User
Brand Manager
Brand Admin
fields.description: Role within the brand portal

fields.label: Brand
fields.description: Brand this user is associated with

fields.label: Company Name
fields.description: Company the user represents

fields.label: Company Registration Number
fields.description: Official company registration/tax ID

fields.label: Can Submit Products
fields.description: Allow user to submit new product data

fields.label: Can Edit Products
fields.description: Allow user to edit their submitted products

fields.label: Can View Analytics
fields.description: Allow user to view product analytics

fields.label: Can Manage Media
fields.description: Allow user to upload and manage product media

fields.label: Can Approve Submissions
fields.description: Allow user to approve other users' submissions (Brand Manager+)

fields.label: Can Manage Users
fields.description: Allow user to manage other portal users (Brand Admin only)

fields.label: Max Submissions per Month
fields.description: Maximum product submissions allowed per month (0 = unlimited)

fields.label: Current Month Submissions
fields.description: Number of submissions made this month

fields.label: Max Media Size (MB)
fields.description: Maximum media upload size in MB

fields.label: Storage Used (MB)
fields.description: Total storage used by uploaded media

fields.label: Last Login
fields.description: Last portal login timestamp

fields.label: Last Submission
fields.description: Last product submission timestamp

fields.label: Total Submissions
fields.description: Total number of product submissions

fields.label: Approved Submissions
fields.description: Number of approved submissions

fields.label: Rejected Submissions
fields.description: Number of rejected submissions

fields.label: Pending Submissions
fields.description: Number of pending submissions

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Internal notes about this portal user

fields.label: Approval Notes
fields.description: Notes from the approval/rejection process

fields.label: Approved On
fields.description: Date when the user was approved

fields.label: Approved By
fields.description: User who approved this portal user

fields.label: Suspended On
fields.description: Date when the user was suspended

fields.label: Suspended By
fields.description: User who suspended this portal user

fields.label: Suspension Reason
fields.description: Reason for suspension
